name: Call Center Voice AI
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Communication Services
services.purpose: Telephony — inbound/outbound PSTN calling, call routing, recording

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Real-time STT and TTS — speech recognition and voice synthesis pipeline

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for conversational understanding, intent extraction, and response generation

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Voice pipeline orchestrator — STT→LLM→TTS streaming coordination

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Call recordings, transcription logs, conversation history archive

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, SIP credentials, Communication Services connection strings

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Call quality metrics, latency tracing, STT/TTS accuracy dashboards

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for simple intent classification before escalating to GPT-4o — saves 70% on AI
Pre-cache common responses as audio (TTS) to avoid per-call synthesis costs
Use Azure AI Speech batch transcription for post-call analytics — 50% cheaper than real-time
Route simple IVR flows without LLM involvement — DTMF + rules costs nothing extra
Enable call recording only for compliance-required calls — reduces storage costs significantly
Use Container Apps scale-to-zero during off-hours if call center has defined operating hours
